name: C-2 control mapping: legal-review-mark requires --framework, --control-id, --reviewer, --date, --controls-file
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q -- '--framework, --control-id, --reviewer, --date, --controls-file required' err.txt && echo required 1>&2
